entry.title: Revolt
entry.content:
Joseph Chee Chang, Saleema Amershi, Ece Kamar. coming soon..

Generating comprehensive labeling guidelines for crowdworkers can be chellenging for complex datasets. Revolt harnesses crowdworker disagreements to identify ambiguous concepts in the data and coordinates the crowd to collaboratively create rich structures for requesters to make post-hoc decisions, removing the need for comprehensive guidelines and enabling dynamic label boundaries.
